description: Promote hex-hub to autonomous orchestration nexus with hex-agent Rust binary, AgentDB RL, chat UI, and SSH remote compute

tasks.name: Create hex-agent Cargo project
tasks.description: Initialize hex-agent/ with Cargo.toml, workspace setup, directory structure following hex architecture

tasks.name: Domain types
tasks.description: Define Message, Role, TokenBudget, ConversationState, ToolCall, ToolResult, AgentTask, AgentDefinition, Skill, Hook, HookEvent, WorkplanPhase

tasks.name: Port traits
tasks.description: Define AnthropicPort, ContextManagerPort, SkillLoaderPort, HookRunnerPort, ToolExecutorPort, AgentLoaderPort, WorkplanPort, HubClientPort

tasks.name: Anthropic Messages API adapter
tasks.description: reqwest + SSE streaming, tool_use support, token tracking, configurable model/base-url

tasks.name: Context window manager adapter
tasks.description: Token counting (tiktoken-rs or char-estimate), sliding window, eviction, budget partitioning, summarization

tasks.name: Filesystem tool executor adapter
tasks.description: Implements ToolExecutorPort — read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, bash, list_dir. Safe path handling.

tasks.name: Skill loader adapter
tasks.description: Parse .md skill files with YAML frontmatter, extract trigger patterns, build skill registry

tasks.name: Agent definition loader adapter
tasks.description: Parse .yml agent definitions, extract role/tools/constraints

tasks.name: Hub client adapter
tasks.description: WebSocket client that connects hex-agent back to hex-hub for streaming output and receiving commands

tasks.name: Hook runner adapter
tasks.description: Execute hooks as shell subprocesses with timeout, lifecycle events (pre-task, post-task, etc.)

tasks.name: CLI primary adapter
tasks.description: stdin/stdout interactive chat, argument parsing (--model, --agent, --project-dir)

tasks.name: Conversation loop use case
tasks.description: Multi-turn loop: send messages to Anthropic, handle tool_use blocks, execute tools, feed results back. Manages context window via ContextManagerPort. Dispatches hooks via HookRunnerPort.

tasks.name: Context packing use case
tasks.description: Smart context assembly: load CLAUDE.md, inject dependency graph, inject workplan state, load relevant skills, pack conversation history within budget

tasks.name: Composition root + main
tasks.description: Wire all adapters to ports, parse CLI args, start conversation loop or connect to hub

tasks.name: RL SQLite schema
tasks.description: Tables: rl_states, rl_actions, rl_experiences (state,action,reward,next_state,timestamp), rl_q_table, rl_patterns. Migrations in persistence.rs.

tasks.name: Q-learning engine
tasks.description: Tabular Q-learning with epsilon-greedy exploration. State: (task_type, codebase_size_bucket, agent_count, token_usage_bucket). Actions: agent_selection, context_strategy, parallelism_level. Learning rate 0.1, discount 0.95, epsilon 0.1 with decay.

tasks.name: Pattern store with confidence
tasks.description: Store/retrieve patterns with confidence scores. Temporal decay (half-life 7 days). Reinforcement on success. Category-based retrieval.

tasks.name: RL REST API routes
tasks.description: POST /api/rl/action (query optimal action), POST /api/rl/reward (record outcome), GET /api/rl/stats (Q-table stats), GET /api/rl/patterns (search patterns)

tasks.name: Chat WebSocket protocol
tasks.description: Extend hex-hub WS to support: chat_message, chat_stream_chunk, tool_call_start, tool_call_result, token_update, agent_status. Route chat messages to hex-agent process stdin/WebSocket.

tasks.name: Chat UI (vanilla JS)
tasks.description: Chat interface in hex-hub/assets/chat.html (loaded via rust-embed). Message input, streaming response, tool call cards, token gauge, agent selector, conversation history sidebar.

tasks.name: Agent lifecycle manager
tasks.description: Spawn hex-agent processes (local or remote), monitor via heartbeat, terminate on timeout/completion. Track in SQLite.

tasks.name: Workplan executor
tasks.description: Parse workplan JSON, execute phases in tier order, spawn hex-agent per adapter boundary, gate on validation verdict, track in SQLite, report via WS.

tasks.name: Orchestration API routes
tasks.description: POST /api/workplan/execute, GET /api/agents/list, POST /api/agents/spawn, DELETE /api/agents/:id, GET /api/workplan/status

tasks.name: SSH adapter (russh)
tasks.description: Connect to remote nodes, execute commands, transfer files (scp). Key-based auth only. Connection pooling.

tasks.name: Binary deployer
tasks.description: Deploy hex-agent + ruflo to remote node. Check existing version, upload if needed, verify checksum.

tasks.name: Fleet manager
tasks.description: Register compute nodes, health check loop, capacity tracking, node selection for task assignment.

tasks.name: Remote compute API routes
tasks.description: POST /api/fleet/register, GET /api/fleet/status, POST /api/fleet/:node/deploy, DELETE /api/fleet/:node

tasks.name: hex-agent unit tests
tasks.description: Test domain types, port trait contracts, conversation loop with mock Anthropic adapter, context packing logic

tasks.name: hex-hub RL engine tests
tasks.description: Test Q-learning convergence, pattern CRUD, confidence decay, API routes

tasks.name: End-to-end integration
tasks.description: Full pipeline: hub spawns agent, chat message via WS, agent calls Anthropic mock, tool_use round-trip, RL records experience, workplan multi-phase execution

parallel_opportunities: P1 + P4 can run in parallel (hex-agent domain vs hex-hub RL — independent codebases)
P2.1-P2.6 all depend only on P1.3 and can run in parallel
P3.1-P3.2 depend only on P1.3 and can run in parallel with P2
P6 can start as soon as P5.3 is done (doesn't need full P5)
